package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for middleware_calls_repository_directly: Middleware that reaches into repositories instead of delegating through focused services or auth abstractions.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule086NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule086NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule086NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario086Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule086NegativeService, input Rule086NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
